summary: FQ-09R review hardening: the FQ-02 foreground/background tree split is replaced by one unified tree rule. Every generated tree is a tree_trunk column (wood hardness 0.55, axe-preferred, drops 1 wood per cell) topped by a tree_leaves canopy (3x2, hardness 0.15, no drops); both blocks are non-solid and non-placeable, so every tree is walk-past AND harvestable through the existing mining/axe path. background_cells, the BackgroundFlora layer, bg_trunk/bg_canopy, and the tree_foreground_ratio key + Solid Tree Ratio slider are removed; placed wood stays solid and buildable; mined tree cells persist as normal air deltas. Creation forms now state live ownership rules (character-owned carried state, role grants once, collapse loses a fraction of stacks; world-owned terrain/progression/position/health) with the drops-vs-loses wording bug fixed. 8 fq02_* smoke checks replaced by 8 fq09r_* checks; suite stays 183/183 with frame baselines preserved (dirt 21 / trunk 33 / stone 66 / axe 24). Review verdict SIGNABLE, zero blockers; one nit fixed.
scope: FQ-09R only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md — no new ores, stations, farming, animation, or progression mechanics. Implementation commit f12946c plus this evidence-only packet commit; not pushed (operator-gated).
next_action: FQ-09S: skill tree visual treatment pass.
